name: BIO-key International, Inc.

profile.description: BIO-key International provides biometric authentication solutions including fingerprint and palm scanning for identity verification in enterprise and government markets.

innovation.label: WEAK
innovation.analysis: Track Record (1/3): Revenue declined 15.1% YoY with losses deepening. AI Deployment (0/2): No AI products. Market Share (1/2): Niche biometric authentication player. Pipeline (0/2): None. R&D Intensity (1/1): Above-average for size [1].

inspiration.label: WEAK
inspiration.analysis: Mission Floor (1/4): Generic security mission. Community (0/2): None. Retention (0/2): 0 employees reported. Insider (1/2): Some activity [1].

infrastructure.label: WEAK
infrastructure.analysis: LIQUIDITY FLOOR TRIGGERED: 3,333,180 × $0.58 = $1.93M barely above. D/E 9.2%, ROE -80.2%, profit margin -75.3%. Revenue declining with deep losses [1].

ai_resilience.label: HIGH RISK
ai_resilience.analysis: AI Risk Protection (4/9): Biometric authentication faces AI disruption from facial recognition and multi-modal AI authentication systems [1]. AI Opportunity (0/1): None [1].

investment_thesis: Biometric authentication provider with declining revenue and deep losses [1].
thesis_continued: AI disruption from facial recognition and multi-modal authentication threatens the core business [1].
sources: Yahoo Finance / yfinance data for BKYI (BIO-key), retrieved April 2026
